parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ model: $json.model || 'dall-e-3', prompt: $json.prompt, n: 1, size: ($json.dimensions === '1024x1280' || $json.dimensions === '1024x1792' ? '1024x1792' : $json.dimensions === '1792x1024' ? '1792x1024' : '1024x1024'), quality: 'standard', response_format: 'url' }) }}

storeOs.nodePattern: 8-node (Trigger -> Validate -> Derive Visual System -> Build Shot Plan + Prompts -> IF generate -> [Batch -> Generate Image] -> Compile Manifest)

safetyModel.allow_media_generation_required: runtime_config.allow_media_generation: true must be set for image generation
safetyModel.default_behavior: Returns PHASE_9_PROMPTS_ONLY with all prompts but no API calls
safetyModel.deterministic: All prompts are pure functions of (product, shot_type, visual_system) — no randomness
safetyModel.idempotent: Same inputs always produce same prompts and shot plans
safetyModel.cost_control: Only required shots (priority 1-3) are sent for generation; optional shots are prompt_only
